human_hg00_directive.verbatim_intent: ok lets replan and do the new approach i want this done asap
scope: replace repeated per-task PM acceptance with mechanical package integration
use human gates after specific completions

old_process: One review loop per each of 211 nodes: Sol owner, optional/standing Fable, fresh Opus, full PM acceptance, then integration.
new_process: The 211 nodes remain traceability criteria and are owned exactly once by 35 cohesive packages: fresh Sol owner, focused/package tests, fresh Opus, same-owner rework, deterministic staged integration, candidate branch, Fable and human milestone gates.

grandfathered_v1_tasks.history_rule: No existing v1 record is converted, rewritten, or granted candidate status by this mutation.

machine_plan.R_059_disposition: AP-02 contract-harness portability; intentionally outside RUN-1..8

unchanged_invariants.devloop_rule: Public devloop is reused as capability and guide; missing generic authority is never hard-reimplemented in the app.
unchanged_invariants.effects_rule: Every action above the current tier fails closed without a matching candidate-bound human receipt.

main_merge_security_redaction.reason: The direct-main unrelated-history merge retains legacy evidence while removing a developer-home prefix from the published current tree. Original blobs remain reachable in Git history.
main_merge_security_redaction.squashed_public_snapshot_fallback: When pre_mutation_head is absent from the published squashed history, verify each open-v1 record against its pinned original current_blob before applying the exact redaction comparison; do not claim the unavailable pre-mutation-prefix check.

open_v1_records_at_cutover.rule: The cutover blob is read from pre_mutation_head and must retain an exact structural prefix. Only state, review_cycle, transition_history, submissions, advisories, reviews, pm_decisions, and integration may append or advance under v1. Each current blob is re-baselined here with its exact closure state and receipt; all other fields remain byte-equivalent as parsed JSON.

R-041.next_permitted_change: Repository-native integration may append an exact landing/pin receipt; update current_blob/current_state in the same evidence commit.

pre_activation_review_cycles.common_blocker: The Markdown verifier followed four umbrella-workspace links outside the repository, so a fresh isolated worktree could not reproduce HG-00 green.
pm_additional_findings: Sixteen original requirement dependency edges were not preserved transitively by package ownership, including the U-001 gate mutation and the AP-28/AP-29 split.
AP-07's path scope nested later loop-package owners.
Historical PM-gate wording and readiness rows were stale after ADR-034 and R2-A integration.
A deadline slice was implied without an explicit human RESCOPE and truthful claim ceiling.
pre_activation_review_cycles.disposition: Same-PM correction; material graph/verifier changes require fresh Fable and fresh Opus review of the corrected exact commit.

fable_blockers: The human-facing deadline snapshot claimed an R-051 Opus result not yet recorded in the repository authority.
The fixed historical hash guard included open R-041/R-051 records whose required v1 closure must append to them.
pre_activation_review_cycles.disposition: Record the completed R-051 v1 review/integration; split closed immutable hashes from structurally append-only open-v1 cutover prefixes; apply all verifier hardening observations; run fresh cycle 3 on the exact correction commit.
Both mandatory reviewers approved the exact correction commit. Their only residual observation was the non-blocking R-051 submission timestamp ordering corrected by this receipt-only commit.

pm_disposition.basis: The 211-requirement/35-package/40-node graph is complete and acyclic; all dependency, authority, path-scope, open-v1, Markdown, transition, fail-closed, and deadline-slice checks pass; Fable passed and fresh independent Opus approved the exact candidate; no product, runtime, live effect, release, or submission authority is granted.
